improvement: Added a privacy-safe runtime device-context packet for audio evidence so touch-capable narrow-viewport sessions can be distinguished from desktop sessions without collecting raw user agent strings, exact viewport dimensions, or persistent identifiers.

verification.deterministic_contract: A byte-equivalent isolated Node check passed after correcting zero-sized viewport classification; the committed repository test is wired into local and Pages gates.

limits: Touch capability, viewport buckets, and pixel-ratio buckets do not prove a device is an iPhone.
Device context does not prove speaker emission or human audibility.
No Vercel workflow run or deployed commit identity was available for the final commit during this run.
